sections.paragraph:
ταπεινόω [ταπεινός]

—1. ‘cause to be low spatially’, make low, level Lk 3:5.

—2. ‘make/consider unimportant’, in good sense humble Mt 18:4; 23:12b; Lk 14:11b; Js 4:10; 1 Pt 5:6.

—3. ‘cause to be/appear low in status’, in disparaging sense humble, humiliate: through arrogance Mt 23:12a; Lk 14:11a; 18:14a; through engagement in common labor 2 Cor 11:7; through exposure to apparent lack of success 12:21; through crucifixion Phil 2:8.

—4. ‘cause to experience loss’, pass. be in need Phil 4:12.
